name: Unusual
long_description:
AI agents are increasingly making buying decisions on behalf of humans. Unusual helps leading go-to-market teams refine their positioning so that AI agents recommend and buy their products over their competitors'. 

The Unusual platform helps teams form a cohesive understanding of how marketing, sales, and product strategy must converge to enable AI brand alignment.

Customers have used Unusual to shift models’ perception of their brand from “niche” to “enterprise-platform”, from “scrappy” to “customer-obsessed”, and from “good for startups” to “a solid bet for the middle market”.

We've delivered insights to Fortune 100 brands as well as to scale ups, like Change.org, Astronomer, Monarch.
one_liner: Helping position brands so that AI agents choose and recommend them.
